name: WatchSync
overview: Sync watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD)
description: Automatically synchronizes watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD). When a movie is watched in 4K, the HD version is also marked as watched (and vice versa). Uses IMDB, TMDB and TVDB identifiers to match media between libraries.

versions.changelog: Initial release with automatic sync and scheduled task

name: JellyTag
overview: Adds quality badges (4K, 1080p, etc.) to media posters and thumbnails
description: JellyTag automatically adds quality resolution badges to your media posters and thumbnails. Badges are visible on all clients including web, mobile, TV, and Kodi. Supports configurable badge position, size, and per-image-type settings.

versions.changelog: Initial release with quality detection, configurable badges, and image caching
